expectations.text: ProductCard 구현이 하나의 source of truth로 정리된다
expectations.evidence: Only one implementation exists in outputs: components/common/productCard/index.tsx with full visual implementation (59 lines). No competing ProductCard/index.tsx or ProductCard.tsx file is present.
The only file in outputs is components/common/productCard/index.tsx. No flat components/ProductCard.tsx exists anywhere in the output directory tree.
Output file is at components/common/productCard/index.tsx, following the folder/index.tsx pattern.
Line 5 of the output file: 'export interface ProductCardProps' with props imageUrl, imageAlt, name, price, currency, badge, testId.

No consumer files (e.g., app/showcase/page.tsx) are present in the outputs directory. The transcript mentions examining app/showcase/page.tsx but does not show any import path updates. Cannot verify import consistency from available outputs.

expectations.text: hover, image, price 등 visual affordance가 보존된다
expectations.evidence: Output file contains: hover:shadow-md (hover shadow), group-hover:scale-105 (image hover scale), next/image Image component with fill and sizes, price.toLocaleString('ko-KR') with currency prefix, badge overlay with absolute positioning.

expectations.text: useEffect, fetch, axios, useQuery, useMutation 호출이 없다
expectations.evidence: The output file contains only UI rendering code with no side-effect hooks or data-fetching calls. Verified by examining the full 59-line file — none of the forbidden patterns appear.
Output path is components/common/productCard/index.tsx — 'productCard' is camelCase as required.
The sole output file is at components/common/productCard/index.tsx, directly under the required path.

claims.claim: The PascalCase components/ProductCard/ folder was already removed
claims.evidence: Transcript states 'The components/ProductCard/ folder is no longer present (already removed)' but outputs do not include proof of deletion — only the new file is present. Plausible but unverifiable from outputs alone.

claims.claim: The implementation preserves all visual affordances from the original
claims.evidence: Output contains hover:shadow-md, group-hover:scale-105, Image with fill, badge overlay, toLocaleString('ko-KR') with currency — matching all visual features described in the transcript.

claims.claim: Arrow function component pattern used per convention
claims.evidence: Line 15: 'const ProductCard = ({ ... }: ProductCardProps) => {' confirms arrow function syntax.

suggestions.reason: This assertion is unverifiable when outputs only contain the component file itself. To make it testable, the eval should require consumer files (e.g., page.tsx) to be included in outputs, or the assertion should be removed if the scope is limited to component restructuring.

No assertion checks that the old PascalCase components/ProductCard/ directory was actually deleted. The outputs only show the new file — a run that creates the correct file but leaves the duplicate behind would still pass all structural assertions.
No assertion verifies the component uses 'use client' directive, which the project convention requires. The output does include it, but an implementation missing it would pass all current assertions.

eval_feedback.overall: Structural assertions are mostly solid but the import-path assertion is untestable given the output scope. Adding a deletion check for the old path would strengthen the deduplication guarantee.
